personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Python, SQL, Spark & Analytics Pipelines

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience building Python/SQL data pipelines, telemetry analytics platforms, and business-facing reporting systems. Strong background transforming high-volume operational signals into reliable data products using Python, PySpark/Spark, SQL, Airflow-style orchestration, data modeling, data quality controls, and stakeholder collaboration. Experienced partnering with engineering, analytics, and business teams to turn logs, events, and performance data into actionable insights for decision-making.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, converting infrastructure and application signals into trusted analytics and reporting datasets.
Built and optimized large-scale data pipelines across AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, Oracle, and PySpark to support forecasting, operational analytics, and executive-level reporting.
Designed data models and historical retention structures for telemetry analytics, enabling seasonal trend analysis, capacity forecasting, and repeatable business definitions across stakeholders.
Implemented data cleansing, validation, reconciliation, and quality checks to improve reliability and stakeholder confidence in downstream reporting and forecasting outputs.
Partnered with capacity, infrastructure, performance, and business stakeholders to translate operational questions into data products, dashboards, and actionable insights.
Developed ML forecasting models using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead with 90%+ accuracy, improving provisioning and planning decisions.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, using performance and user-experience signals to support optimization decisions.
Led the FAST project, data-mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify actionable recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Built operational reporting and analytics workflows around application performance data, helping teams improve reliability, usability, and customer-facing system behavior.
Collaborated with engineering and performance teams to align on metrics, thresholds, transaction definitions, and performance baselines used during releases and production monitoring.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000-6,000 instrumented agents across enterprise applications.
Built Perl/Ksh data extraction and reporting scripts that replaced manual weekly exports and improved repeatability of operational analytics.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and management modules adopted as standards across client environments.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic performance teams to interpret telemetry, diagnose bottlenecks, and improve production observability.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify throughput limits, database bottlenecks, thread pressure, heap behavior, CPU saturation, and garbage collection risks.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation scripts to capture structured performance data during test cycles.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams as release gate criteria.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster handling transaction volume at major travel-commerce scale.
Optimized C++ and OCCI transaction processing, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness across millions of transaction records.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutex locks, semaphores, socket programming, and Marconi APIs for telecom billing systems.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing processes by reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance through sequence optimization.
Maintained AMDOCS billing, invoicing, settlement, EDI, and reporting modules across full production support and enhancement lifecycle.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting, C++, Java
skills.Data Engineering: ETL Design & Optimization, Data Pipelines, Data Modeling, Data Warehousing, Data Quality & Pipeline Validation, Dimensional Modeling, Apache Parquet, Reconciliation, Reporting Pipelines
skills.Big Data & Orchestration: PySpark, Apache Spark, Hive/Hadoop, Airflow, Medallion Architecture
skills.Cloud & Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, AWS Athena, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, Cloud Data Platforms, Snowflake fundamentals, Databricks fundamentals, Delta Lake fundamentals
skills.Analytics & ML: Telemetry Analysis, Capacity Forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn, Pandas, matplotlib, plotly, Streamlit
skills.Observability & Event Signals: Dynatrace AppMon, Synthetic Monitoring, RUM/EUM, CA APM / Introscope, BMC TrueSight / TSCO, AppDynamics, Transaction Tracing, Dashboards, Alerts, Thresholds
skills.DevOps & Tools: Docker, Git, Linux/Unix, pytest, CI/CD Pipelines

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit forecasting engine that transformed enterprise telemetry into capacity insights and reduced forecasting cycles by 90%.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark, including data lake ingestion, transformation, query optimization, Parquet/Snappy storage, and Text-to-SQL GenAI access patterns.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python-based agentic workflow that performs semantic duplicate detection, job scoring, tailored resume generation, cover letter generation, quality gates, and application tracking.

projects.name: FAST Project
projects.description: Data-mined real-user and synthetic performance metrics from Dynatrace/Gomez monitoring data to identify optimization opportunities for critical customer-facing hospitality systems.
